criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads of the app.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration in the app for features like personalized recommendations, visual search, chatbots, etc.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Quality and ease of use of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of the app's features.

criteria.name: Performance
criteria.description: Speed, stability, and resource usage of the app.

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: Level of security and privacy features implemented in the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, security audits

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: App's accessibility features for users with disabilities.

criteria.name: Localization
criteria.description: Availability of the app in different languages and regions.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and new feature releases.
